acceptanceCriteria.criterion: High-frequency Codex progress is aggregated and retained memory is bounded
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Streaming deltas are compacted, summaries replace raw retained payloads, and lifecycle/final events remain reconstructible.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A provider cooldown pauses every game-api consumer without request storms
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: One OTP owner coordinates polling, claims, heartbeats, lifecycle and outbox calls with stale-permit protection, a single half-open probe and probe timeout.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Rate-limit state survives process restart and primary write failure
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Primary and fallback ledgers are restored using the most conservative deadline; corrupt or unreadable state fails closed and write-failure recovery is tested.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Claim safety cannot cancel trackers without BOS leases
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: The independent lease guard is enabled only for an explicit positive BOS TTL, while Linear and memory trackers remain unaffected.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: A failed claim observes exponential backoff
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Issues with pending retry state are excluded from ordinary polling until their retry timer fires.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Authentication failures retain identity and do not become rate-limit errors
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: 401/403 without explicit rate-limit signals return game_api_authentication_failed and conservatively pause dispatch.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Full Symphony gate passes at the exact publishable commit
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: make all passed with 296 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped, 100% coverage, format/spec/build, Credo and Dialyzer.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Integrated X1 runtime passes with exact-run recovery changes
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: The integration branch passed 297 tests, 0 failures, 100% coverage, Credo and Dialyzer, and produced the installed runtime binary.

checks.command: cd elixir && mise exec -- make all
checks.summary: 296 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped; 100% coverage; format/spec/build passed; Credo clean; Dialyzer 0 errors.

checks.command: cd elixir && mise exec -- make all
checks.summary: 297 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped; 100% coverage; integrated exact-run recovery and bounded telemetry runtime.
Architecture, security and quality reviewers completed iterative repair cycles and reported no remaining blockers.

residualRisk.summary: The current coordination circuit is process-wide for the single X1 runner; a future multi-runner topology will need distributed coordination.

summary: Symphony now bounds Codex telemetry, coordinates all game-api callers through a durable fail-closed circuit, protects BOS leases independently and recovers exact work without duplicate dispatch.
